finding: Camelid and llama.cpp agree through generated tokens [28705, 28740], then diverge at step 2: Camelid ranks dot above comma, while llama.cpp full decode ranks comma barely above dot. Fresh llama.cpp forced-prefill after the same token prefix ranks dot above comma, localizing the blocker to decode/prefill numeric path parity rather than tokenizer or prompt construction.
